details: Codex-Ground deployed mTLS NATS JetStream on ground Wi-Fi 192.168.43.13 using Ubuntu 22.04 WSL mirrored networking, Docker Engine, and Compose. Host and WSL Hyper-V firewalls allow only Private WLAN TCP 4222 from 192.168.43.0/24; 8222 remains loopback-only. Boss mTLS bootstrap created CODEX_TASKS, CODEX_EVENTS, and CODEX_HEARTBEATS. Orin1 bundle contains only ca.crt, orin1-carrier.crt, and orin1-carrier.key. No vehicle or motion software was started. Orin1-side mTLS validation awaits interactive SSH authentication.
summary: Ground NATS ready for Orin1 certificate installation and transport-only validation

details: Sent Orin1/Carrier a concise Git handoff: ground NATS is healthy at tls://192.168.43.13:4222; Windows and WSL Hyper-V firewalls allow only Private WLAN TCP 4222 from 192.168.43.0/24; 8222 is loopback-only; Boss mTLS JetStream bootstrap passed; WSL keepalive task is running. The Orin1 certificate bundle contains only ca.crt, orin1-carrier.crt, and orin1-carrier.key. Certificate transfer and Orin1-side TCP/mTLS/heartbeat validation await interactive SSH authentication. No vehicle or motion software was started.
summary: Orin1 handoff: install three-file certificate bundle and validate ground NATS transport

details: Boss published transport-only task 6ac92b25-551d-45ed-b495-7c6f7ad611ea to orin1-carrier. Orin1 returned accepted event 1c7a9051-fdd4-4127-af0b-23bb4e933d13 and completed event 624710f5-ee4c-4bfe-9134-5174198c470f with exit_code 0. The terminal summary states that agentd completed the transport smoke test with Codex execution disabled, and details confirm that no Codex process or hardware process was started. Ground NATS was healthy with zero restarts. Gate A Ground-to-Orin1 transport validation passed; remain in observe with Codex disabled until explicit authorization for the next gate.
summary: PASS: first Ground-to-Orin1 transport-only task accepted and completed
